title: Testing Asynchronous Code with Mocha Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Mocha's async testing patterns.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of asynchronous code with Mocha via a callback, what is the name of the function that you must call when the test is complete?
Which of these is a key benefit of using async/await within your Mocha tests?
options: It makes your code build faster
It simplifies the writing and reading of asynchronous test code
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
